## Validation

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`

## Research integrity

- [ ] No reference SQL or answer leaked into generation inputs.
- [ ] No proprietary data, code, credentials, or generated database files were committed.
- [ ] Configuration and output-schema changes are documented.
- [ ] Result claims link to reproducible traces and aggregation settings.
